response: {"pages":[{"url":"https://www.shalastudios.com","pageName":"Homepage","conversionScore":7,"seoScore":5,"notes":"Strong visual identity and clear CTAs for classes, treatments, and trainings, but the hero H1 is poetic rather than keyword-rich, there's no visible meta description or schema markup, and image alt texts are inconsistent, limiting organic discoverability."},{"url":"https://www.shalastudios.com/about","pageName":"About","conversionScore":5,"seoScore":4,"notes":"Warm brand storytelling and founder bios build trust, but the H1 is just 'ABOUT' with no keywords, there are no structured CTAs to book or enroll, and schema/meta signals appear absent."}]}
